This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] invoking (as show-modal) on popover does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
[FAIL] invoking (as show-modal) on open popover does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
[FAIL] invoking (as show-picker) on popover does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
[FAIL] invoking (as show-picker) on open popover does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
[FAIL] invoking (as open) on popover does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
[FAIL] invoking (as open) on open popover does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
[FAIL] invoking (as close) on popover does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
[FAIL] invoking (as close) on open popover does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
Harness: the test ran to completion.
